array_of_collection_info_with_name_type_: Array of collection info with name, type, document count, and indexes (introspect operation)
array_of_documents_returned_from_the_ope: Array of documents returned from the operation
array_of_ids_for_inserted_documents_mult: Array of IDs for inserted documents (multiple insert)
describe_how_you_want_to_sort_the_result: Describe how you want to sort the results...
describe_the_aggregation_you_want_to_per: Describe the aggregation you want to perform...
describe_the_documents_you_want_to_find: Describe the documents you want to find...
describe_the_documents_you_want_to_inser: Describe the documents you want to insert...
describe_what_you_want_to_update: Describe what you want to update...
id_of_the_inserted_document_single_inser: ID of the inserted document (single insert)
insert_a_new_mongodb_document_or_update_: Insert a new MongoDB document or update an existing one matched by a key.
integrate_mongodb_into_the_workflow_can_: Integrate MongoDB into the workflow. Can find, insert, update, delete, and aggregate data.
number_of_documents_affected_by_the_oper: Number of documents affected by the operation
query_a_mongodb_collection_with_a_filter: Query a MongoDB collection with a filter and return the matching documents.
run_a_mongodb_aggregation_pipeline_to_gr: Run a MongoDB aggregation pipeline to group and summarize collection data.
success_or_error_message_describing_the_: Success or error message describing the operation outcome
